title: Game Play Analysis I
description: Find the first login date for each player.
constraints: (player_id, event_date) is the primary key — no duplicate rows per player per day
Each player has at least one row
key_concept: MIN() aggregation with GROUP BY. First occurrence per group.

hints.L1: Group by player and find the minimum event_date.
hints.L2: SELECT player_id, MIN(event_date) AS first_login FROM Activity GROUP BY player_id
hints.L3: SELECT player_id, MIN(event_date) AS first_login FROM Activity GROUP BY player_id

optimal_solution: SELECT player_id, MIN(event_date) AS first_login FROM Activity GROUP BY player_id;
